response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title as 'We are GAMERS !!!!' through web search and audio. Artist is hololive GAMERS. Searched for 'We are GAMERS !!!! hololive GAMERS Japanese and English lyrics' and found lyrics on Lyrical Nonsense. Divided video into scenes based on visual and audio changes: concert performance (00:00-03:25), talk/announcements with fading song (03:25-04:00), and end screen (04:00-04:04).
response.global_summary: A concert performance segment featuring the VTuber group hololive GAMERS (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone) performing the song 'We are GAMERS !!!!', followed by a short talk segment and an end screen.

scenes.description: The four members of hololive GAMERS are performing the song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(G.A.M.E.R.S)
We are GAMERS!!!!
(G.A.M.E.R.S)
We are GAMERS!!!!
(フブキ)
こーん!とキツネが登場
白髪ケモミミ白上フブキです
スッ込んでちゃ始まらない
君もすこん部に入部しなさい
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!) Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
古今東西 コーン茶をちょーだい
AIじゃないし 得意はMC
赤い恋より金の鯉が推し
うちうちうち
(ミオ)
たゆたう影はオオカミじゃん
占い師だよ 大神ミオです
ハプニングなら大歓迎
迷い込んだらここへおいで
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!) Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
ホロライブゲーマーズ 絆は最強
(Okayu)
甘いボイスで癒しを供給
猫又おかゆ おにぎり食べる
(Korone)
戌神ころね 指をちょーだい
(All)
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS!!!!
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS!!!!
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS!!!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(G.A.M.E.R.S)
We are GAMERS!!!!
(G.A.M.E.R.S)
We are GAMERS!!!!
(Fubuki)
Kon! And the fox appears
It's the white-haired furry-eared Fubuki Shirakami
It won't start if you just sit there
Join the Sukon club, you too
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!) Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
All over the world, give me some corn tea
I'm not an AI, my specialty is MC
I prefer golden koi over red love
Us, us, us
(Mio)
Isn't the wavering shadow a wolf?
I'm the fortune teller, Mio Ookami
I welcome any happenings
If you get lost, come here
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!) Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
hololive GAMERS, the bond is the strongest
(Okayu)
Supplying comfort with a sweet voice
I'm Nekomata Okayu, eating rice balls
(Korone)
I'm Inugami Korone, give me your finger
(All)
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS!!!!
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS!!!!
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS!!!!

scenes.description: The song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' fades out while the members talk to the audience.
